findings.title: Interprocedural SQLi taint: createNativeQuery() at line 64
findings.description: Tainted argument flows to SQL sink through `createNativeQuery()`. Call at L64: `createNativeQuery(nativeSql, params)`.
findings.suggestion: Review the data flow through helper methods. Ensure parameterized queries.

findings.title: CWE-78: OS command injection in `open()`
findings.description: Runtime.exec/ProcessBuilder with user-controlled input.
findings.suggestion: Avoid passing user input to exec/ProcessBuilder.

findings.title: CWE-79: XSS via unencoded response write in `runNextCommand()`
findings.description: response.getWriter().write() outputs user-controlled data without HTML encoding.
findings.suggestion: Encode output with an HTML encoder or use a template engine that auto-escapes.

findings.title: CWE-330: Weak random number generator in `lookup()`
findings.description: java.util.Random or Math.random() used — not cryptographically secure.
findings.suggestion: Use java.security.SecureRandom for security-sensitive randomness.

findings.title: Interprocedural SQLi taint: executeSocket() at line 288
findings.description: Tainted argument flows to SQL sink through `executeSocket()`. Call at L288: `executeSocket(request, redirectCount, cancel, callback, data)`.
findings.suggestion: Review the data flow through helper methods. Ensure parameterized queries.

findings.title: CWE-330: Weak random number generator in `frame()`
findings.description: java.util.Random or Math.random() used — not cryptographically secure.
findings.suggestion: Use java.security.SecureRandom for security-sensitive randomness.

findings.title: CWE-328: Weak cryptographic algorithm (SHA-1) at line 40
findings.description: `getInstance("SHA-1")` at L40. SHA-1 is cryptographically broken and vulnerable to collision attacks.
findings.suggestion: Use SHA-256 or stronger. For passwords, use bcrypt, scrypt, or Argon2.

findings.title: CWE-327: Weak cryptographic hash in `SHA1()`
findings.description: MD5 or SHA-1 used for hashing — vulnerable to collision attacks.
findings.suggestion: Use SHA-256 or SHA-3 via MessageDigest.getInstance("SHA-256").

findings.title: CWE-501: Trust boundary violation at line 63
findings.description: Untrusted data `skin` from request parameter is stored in `session.setAttribute()` at L63. This mixes trusted and untrusted data across the trust boundary.
findings.suggestion: Validate and sanitize input before storing in trusted context, or use a separate namespace for user-supplied data.

findings.title: CWE-601: Open redirect via sendRedirect in `preHandle()`
findings.description: HttpServletResponse.sendRedirect() is called with a URL that may be attacker-influenced.
findings.suggestion: Validate the redirect target against an allowlist or use a mapping instead of user-supplied URLs.

findings.title: CWE-501: Trust boundary violation in `preHandle()`
findings.description: Session/request attribute set with potentially untrusted data.
findings.suggestion: Validate or sanitize data before storing in session/request attributes.

findings.title: CWE-614: Cookie missing Secure flag in `generateCookie()`
findings.description: A Cookie is created and added to the response without calling setSecure(true).
findings.suggestion: Add `cookie.setSecure(true)` and `cookie.setHttpOnly(true)` for all sensitive cookies.
